items.name: Pani – Puri (8pcs)
items.description: Hollow Puri (a deep-fried crisp flatbread), served with flavoured water, tamarind chutney, chilli powder, chaat masala, potato mash and onion.

items.name: Poleko Makai (3pcs)
items.description: Classic Street food of Nepal. Grilled corn served with homemade spicy sauce.

items.name: Chaat
items.description: Delicious crispy fried-dough wafers, potatoes and peas topped with chickpea curry, tamarind, yogurt sauce and garnished with pomegranate seeds and fresh herbs.

items.name: Chau Chau Chatpate (Wai Wai)
items.description: Crispy fried noodles tossed with veggies, and spices.

items.name: Fried Chicken Sausage
items.description: Most popular street food in Nepal, Served with spicy tomato sauce.

items.name: Goat Bhutan
items.description: Goat offal stir-fried in a mix of Himalayan herbs and spices, served with salad.

items.name: Choila
items.description: Meat/ Veg marinated with Himalayan herbs, green chillies, spring onion, ginger, garlic, lime and mustard oil. Served with tomato salad.

items.name: Chilli
items.description: Choice of protein/vegetable tossed with capsicum and onion in our special tomato based hot sauce.

items.name: Tareko Machha (Fried Fish) (6pcs)
items.description: Fish fillet marinated with Himalayan spices and herbs, deep fried and served with sauce and pickled onion.

items.name: Chicken Lollipops (6pcs)
items.description: Chicken wings coated in a spicy batter and deep fried, served with green chutney and pickled onion.

items.name: Maas ko Bara
items.description: Black lentil patties with fresh ginger and Himalayan salt, shallow fried as a crispy fritter served with house made green chutney and pickled onion and tomato salsa.

items.name: Sekuwa
items.description: Meat/veg marinated with special homemade spices and herbs cooked in Tandoor oven, served with green and red tomato salad and green chutney.

items.name: Sukuti (Dried lamb meat)
items.description: Dried meat sautéed with onion, chillies, tomatoes and seasoned with dash of Himalayan spices.

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: A hot and spicy egg noodle soup with aromatic herbs and spices.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Stir-fried egg noodles with fresh mix of vegetables and touch of spices and herbs.

items.name: Steamed Momo
items.description: Dumplings filled with minced meat or vegetables, a stable blend of herbs and spices. Served with special Nepalese chutney. (10pcs)

items.name: Chilli Momo
items.description: Dumplings filled with minced meat or vegetables, a stable blend of herbs and spices. Served with special Nepalese chutney. (10pcs)

items.name: Kothe Momo
items.description: Dumplings filled with minced meat or vegetables, a stable blend of herbs and spices. Served with special Nepalese chutney. (10pcs)

items.name: Fried Momo
items.description: Dumplings filled with minced meat or vegetables, a stable blend of herbs and spices. Served with special Nepalese chutney. (10pcs)

items.name: Jhol Momo
items.description: Dumplings filled with minced meat or vegetables, a stable blend of herbs and spices. Served with special Nepalese chutney. (10pcs)

items.name: Choila Set
items.description: Choila served with beaten rice flakes, bhatmas sadeko, spicy potato salad (aalu ko achar) and green salad.

items.name: Sekuwa Set
items.description: Sekuwa served with beaten rice flakes, bhatmas sadeko, spicy potato salad (aalu ko achar) and green salad.

items.name: Goat Bhutan Set
items.description: Bhuttan served with beaten rice flakes, bhatmas sadeko, spicy potato salad (aalu ko achar) and green salad.

items.name: Laltin Family MOMO Platter (20 pieces)
items.description: Consists of Steamed MOMO, Chilli MOMO, Kothe MOMO and Fried MOMO.

items.name: Nepali Street Food Platter
items.description: Aalu ko Achar (Spicy potato salad), Corn Lollipop (Poleko Makai), Lamb Sekuwa, Steamed Momo, Fried sausage, Chutney, and Tomato Salad.

items.name: Khaja Set
items.description: Curry potatoes, black eyed beans and bamboo shoot (Aalu Tama Bodi), spicy potato salad (aalu ko achar), beaten rice flakes (chiura), spicy soybean (bhatmas sadeko), black lentil patties (maas ko bara) and spicy marinated Veg or Meat Choila.

items.name: MOMO Platter (12 pieces)
items.description: Consists of Steamed MOMO, Chilli MOMO and Kothe MOMO.

items.name: Aalu Chips
items.description: Deep-fried potato chips sautéed with dry herbs and spices.

items.name: Aalu Ko Achar (served cold)
items.description: Boiled Potatoes mixed in sesame paste, vegetables infused with spices and garnished with herbs.

items.name: Chana Chatpat (salad)
items.description: Chickpeas combined with fresh vegetables, seasoned with Himalayan black salt, topping with Aalu bhaji.

items.name: Bhatmas Sadheko
items.description: Fried soybeans mixed with fresh garlic, ginger and onions, and a touch of mustard oil.

items.name: Aalu Tama Bodi
items.description: Potatoes, Bamboo shoot and black-eyed beans curry, garnished with fresh herbs.

items.name: Maas ko Daal / Chana ko Daal
items.description: Black lentils / Chickpeas cooked with Himalayan herbs and mild spices.

items.name: Kukhura ko Massu (Nepali style chicken curry)
items.description: Chicken (bone in) curry made with tomatoes, onion, ginger, and garlic base.

items.name: Khasi ko Maasu (Goat Curry)
items.description: Village style Goat meat cooked in a rich blend of spices, garlic, and ginger.

items.name: Local Kukhura ko Massu (Village style Curry)
items.description: Traditional village style, farm fresh free range chicken curry (bone in) with ginger, garlic, and fresh herbs.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Tender Chicken cooked in a rich blend of spices and thick tomato base gravy with dry herbs.

items.name: Fish Curry
items.description: Traditional Nepali village style fish curry cooked with an infusion of spices, fresh herbs, garlic, and ginger.

items.name: Palak Panner
items.description: Spinach mixed with curry, garam masala, fresh ginger, and Cottage Cheese.

items.name: Bhuteko Bhaat
items.description: Nepali style fried rice mixed with fresh vegetables, herbs, and choice of protein.

items.name: Biryani
items.description: Rice infused with a rich blend of spices and mixed with Veg/Protein.

items.name: Naan
items.description: Soft flat bread baked in Tandoor Oven.

items.name: Bhaat
items.description: Steamed Jasmine Rice.

items.name: Faparko Roti
items.description: Buckwheat flour bread.

items.name: Thakali Thali Set
items.description: Traditional Nepali Thali (plate) consists of lentil soup (Dal), vegetable curry, meat curry, sautéed spinach, radish pickles, house made yoghurt, chutney, and rice.

items.name: Dhedo Thali Set
items.description: Traditional Nepali Thali (plate) consists of lentil soup (Dal), vegetable curry, meat curry, sautéed spinach, radish pickles, house made yoghurt, chutney, and sticky soft, cooked dough. (Buckwheat flour)

items.name: Faparko Roti Set
items.description: Traditional Nepali Thali (plate) consists of lentil soup (Dal), vegetable curry, meat curry, sautéed spinach, radish pickles, house made yoghurt, chutney, and roti (Buckwheat flour bread).

items.name: Green Salad
items.description: Nepali style fresh vegetable salad. Cucumber, Carrot, Radish, Tomato and Onion cut into wedges and lightly seasoned with chat masala.

items.name: Chicken Corn Salad
items.description: Shredded spiced roasted chicken mixed with Grilled Corn kernel, chiffonade cabbage dressed with zesty salad dressing.

items.name: Gulab Jamun
items.description: Fried balls of dough made from milk solids and semolina, soaked in an aromatic syrup served with yoghurt and sweet angel hair crispy pastry.

items.name: Pistachio, honey & cardamom kulfi
items.description: Ice cream made with milk, sugar, nuts, cardamoms, served with sweet angel hair crispy pastry.

items.name: Hot chips, Nuggets, and a drink
